name: Nialia
description:
Not lore-friendly I guess.

Wanted to create some alien bot, decided to go with this one.
Kaminoan chick from Star Wars, works as a secretary on a clone facility which you suddenly decide to visit.

This bot isn't lore friendly and I have never intended it to be like it.
Used Ali:Chat format.

Have a great day fellas.
creator: lil_nikchema
